untranslatable_reason: The signal requires 'put/(put+call) ratio from open buy volume' and 'decile ranking', neither of which are in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This is an options-based factor requiring custom calculation of the put/call ratio and cross-sectional decile assignment that cannot be expressed using only price, technical, and volatility indicators.
translation_notes: Signal is based on options market sentiment (put/call ratio) applied to daily cross-sectional decile formation. Holding period is unspecified (AUTHOR_SILENT). The minimum 50 contracts of open buy volume requirement cannot be encoded in the current rule structure as it requires options data filtering. A reversal rule was used for exits as the natural counterpart to entry conditions.
